generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know our allies are actually benefiting more from our security commitments than we are? While we spend billions on collective defense, many NATO members aren't meeting their 2% GDP spending targets. It's time we focus on securing our own borders and civil liberties first. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
